quicksight.template.histogramvisual.CfnA:
A histogram.

For more information, see [Using histograms](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/histogram-charts.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.template.histogramvisual.Acti.Description: The list of custom actions that are configured for a visual.

quicksight.template.histogramvisual.Subt.Description: The subtitle that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.template.histogramvisual.Titl.Description: The title that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.template.histogramvisual.Visu.Description: The unique identifier of a visual. This identifier must be unique within the context of a dashboard, template, or analysis. Two dashboards, analyses, or templates can have visuals with the same identifiers.
